creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tota        2011-05-05 01:15:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/encode-explorer  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/encode-explorer/files extra-patch-index-php-experimental 
  Log:
  - Add a new port: www/encode-explorer
  
    Encode Explorer is an easy-to-use php script to use as an index file.
    It shows files in the server and lets you browse through folders,
    upload files etc. It is kept small and neat so that the source can be
    used for learning.
  
    WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/encode-explorer/
  
  PR:             ports/152082
  Submitted by:   Frank Wall <fw_AT_moov_DOT_de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2876    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/www/encode-explorer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/encode-explorer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +753 -0    ports/www/encode-explorer/files/extra-patch-index-php-experimental (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/encode-explorer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/encode-explorer/pkg-plist (new)
